open_prs.title: Restore evidence strip on landing page and fix deleted RunHistoryTests

notes: PR #393 (fix evidence strip + RunHistoryTests) had review REQUEST_CHANGES. Fixed: (1) ConfigureTestServices instead of ConfigureServices to correctly stub IShowcaseService, (2) split EvidenceStrip_ShowsZeroWhenNoRuns assertion, (3) Razor HTML-encodes '+' as '+'. All 162 tests pass. Pushed fix to PR #393. CI incidents #380 and #394 should close on PR merge.
